justification: The diff correctly migrates from Spring Boot 2.x to 3.x (Jakarta EE namespace, Security 6.x DSL, springdoc-openapi-starter) and updates Java version to 21, but does not leverage any Java 21-specific idioms (e.g., records, pattern matching, virtual threads). All deprecated patterns are cleanly removed (javax -> jakarta, EnableGlobalMethodSecurity -> EnableMethodSecurity, antMatchers -> requestMatchers, junit-vintage exclusion removed). The diff is highly coherent with no spurious churn, touching only necessary files and lines for the migration.
